mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_device_wakeup (deviceId, wakeupWord, roleId, priority) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{wakeupWord}, #{roleId}, #{priority})
mapper.select: SELECT id, deviceId, wakeupWord, roleId, priority, createTime FROM sys_device_wakeup WHERE deviceId = #{deviceId} ORDER BY priority ASC
SELECT id, deviceId, wakeupWord, roleId, priority, createTime FROM sys_device_wakeup WHERE deviceId = #{deviceId} AND wakeupWord = #{wakeupWord} LIMIT 1
